title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 546.040 - Issues of fact to be tried by jury
text:
546.040.  Issues of fact to be tried by jury. — All issues of fact in any criminal cause shall be tried by a jury, to be selected, summoned and returned in a manner prescribed by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 4051) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3662; 1919 § 4005; 1909 § 5212 
Defendant may waive trial by jury, when, Const. Art. I § 22(a)
